title: sarothamnus arboreus var. rotundatus
intro: Sarothamnus arboreus var. rotundatus, also known as round-leaved broom or round-leaved broomrape, is a variety of flowering plant in the borage family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Sarothamnus arboreus var. rotundatus include its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its anti-inflammatory properties which may help to reduce symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Herbal preparations of Sarothamnus arboreus var. rotundatus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or by extracting the active compounds with a solvent.
